title: Better MC [FABRIC] - BMC3
description: Version 1.21 | Vanilla+ Experience With The Player in Mind | A New Era of Better MC!
body:
[![This is an image](https://i.imgur.com/jm3PCWv.png)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/better-mc-fabric-bmc3)

[![This is an image](https://img.shields.io/discord/790272037578473512?label=Discord&color=393939&labelColor=4a94fb&style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://lunapixel.studio/discord)

✔️ Frequent Updates with New Features

✔️ Completely Overhauled World Generation (Biomes o' Plenty, Geophilic)

✔️ Fully Optimized with Shader Support

✔️ Hundreds of NEW Dungeons & Structures (Moog's Voyager Structures, AdoraBuild: Structures, Repurposed Structures)

✔️ New Bosses and Mobs (Bosses of Mass Destruction, Friends & Foes)

✔️ QoL Features for a Seamless Experience (Liberty's Villagers, Improved Signs)

✔️ Free and Easy Server Hosting to Play With Friends (Guide)

✔️ Many Custom Features for an Improved Experience

✔️ 160+ Mods

[![This is an image](https://i.imgur.com/VyVHXcd.jpeg)](https://www.bisecthosting.com/LunaPixel)
